name: First American Title Insurance Company
description_short: First American Title Insurance Company is a credit repair provider based in Denver, Colorado. Rated 4.8/5 with 43 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
First American Title Insurance Company is a credit repair provider serving clients in Denver, Colorado. Carrying a 4.8/5.0 Google rating from 43 reviews, First American Title Insurance Company has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Denver area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a escrow service, First American Title Insurance Company provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Denver, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. First American Title Insurance Company operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Denver, Colorado area who are considering First American Title Insurance Company should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
